Logan (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $226,277,068Details
International Box Office $387,925,247
Worldwide Box Office $614,202,315
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $12,465,784
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $33,289,283
Total $45,755,067
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In the near future, a weary Logan cares for an ailing Professor X in a hide out on the Mexican border. But Logan’s attempts to hide from the world and his legacy are up-ended when a young mutant arrives, being pursued by dark forces.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$88,411,916 (39.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.56 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$127,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,071 opening theaters/4,071 max. theaters, 5.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $301,702,757

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 3rd, 2017 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: February 23rd, 2017 (Wide) (South Korea)
March 1st, 2017 (Wide) (Netherlands)
March 2nd, 2017 (Wide) (China)
March 2nd, 2017 (Wide), released as Логан: Върколакът (Bulgaria)
March 3rd, 2017 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
Video Release: May 16th, 2017 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong brutal violence and language throughout, and for brief nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2460 (Cert #50700), 1/25/2017)
Running Time: 135 minutes
Franchise: Wolverine, X-Men
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Geographical setting: Mexico, North Dakota, Oklahoma, Texas
Plot point: Autumn Years, Bad Role Models, Cloning, Corporate Malfeasance, Escape, Father and Daughter, Faulty Memory, Fugitive / On the Run, Human Experimentation, Medical Crimes, Money Troubles, Mutants, Psychics, Road Trip, Super Soldiers, Unexpected Families
Social setting: Dystopia
Source material: Marvel Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: 2020s, Near Future
Source:Spin-Off
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Marvel Studios, TSG Entertainment, Donners’ Company
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

In the near future, a weary Logan cares for an ailing Professor X in a hide out on the Mexican border. But Logan’s attempts to hide from the world and his legacy are up-ended when a young mutant arrives, being pursued by dark forces.
